name: pokemon-shiny-hunt-assistant
description: GUI-based shiny hunting assistant for Pokemon games

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 dist/main/main/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.dev:electron:legacy: wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron electron/main.cjs
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.doctor:dev: node -e "const req=['react','react-dom','vite','@vitejs/plugin-react','electron','wait-on','cross-env','typescript','pngjs'];const miss=req.filter(n=>{try{return !require.resolve(n)}catch{return true}});if(miss.length){console.log('Missing dependencies:',miss.join(', '));console.log('Run: npm install --include=dev');process.exit(1)}console.log('Dependencies OK');"
